scope: Preserve teacher comments, status timeline events, and immutable submission version snapshots in the primary server-owned alpha state, then render them in the main alpha console with storage-identifier blocking.

Extended alpha state-machine tests and alpha contract checks to cover comments, versions, status history, and renderer guardrails.
Updated MVP catalog, handoff ledger, rebuild lane log, run log, automation memory, and this manifest.
